TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Asiroay ga niya mki sku Taitung Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,259 buwan, 3,198 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 1,228 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 1,970 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Paywan 5%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 1%, Puyuma 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal pqwasan biru'. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Asiroay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Asiroay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Asiroay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Asiroay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Asiroay hya' ga Pongodan. tay mkyahu' na Asiroay hya' ga Ining. tay 'llaw na Asiroay hya' ga Fukid. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Asiroay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ as~ɕiroaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku taituŋ keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, rukaj *%, pujuma *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa poŋo*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa iniŋ. taj ʔllaw na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa *uki*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ as~ɕiroaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Asiroay ga niya mki sku Taitung Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,259 buwan, 3,198 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 1,228 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 1,970 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Paywan 5%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 1%, Puyuma 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal pqwasan biru'. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Asiroay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Asiroay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Asiroay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Asiroay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Asiroay hya' ga Pongodan. tay mkyahu' na Asiroay hya' ga Ining. tay 'llaw na Asiroay hya' ga Fukid. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Asiroay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ as~ɕiroaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku taituŋ keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, rukaj *%, pujuma *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal pqwas~ɕan βiruʔ. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa poŋo*an. taj mkjaħuʔ na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa iniŋ. taj ʔllaw na as~ɕiroaj ħjaʔ ɣa *uki*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ as~ɕiroaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
